title: Hello Kitty Doodle Tumbler Set – Colour Your Own Drinks Bottle with Pens & Gem Stickers – 700ml Reusable Drinking Cup with Straw – Arts & Crafts Kit – Colouring Set Activity Gift for Kids & Fans
features: Personalise Your Tumbler : Colour, decorate, and design your own Hello Kitty drinks bottle with the included colouring pens and gem stickers – perfect for creative kids and fans!
Reusable & Practical : This 700ml tumbler comes with a secure screw-on lid and reusable straw, making it ideal for everyday use at home, school, or on the go
Surprise Gift Inside : Includes an exciting mystery gift for extra fun – a special treat for Hello Kitty lovers!
Fun & Easy to Use : A great arts and crafts activity that lets kids & fans express their creativity. Simply colour in, add gems, and enjoy your one-of-a-kind tumbler!
Gift Idea : A fantastic present for birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion – ideal for children aged 5+, teens, and Hello Kitty enthusiasts of all ages!
Safe & Convenient : Handwash only and suitable for cold drinks only. Not microwave safe. Made from durable materials for long-lasting use
description: Add a touch of creativity to your everyday drinks with the Hello Kitty Doodle Tumbler Set! This adorable 700ml drinks cup is more than just a bottle – it’s a fun and interactive arts & crafts project that lets you personalise it just the way you like. With 4 assorted colouring pens and a gem sticker sheet , kids and Hello Kitty fans can bring their favourite character to life in their own unique style. Once decorated, use the reusable tumbler to enjoy your favourite cold drinks, whether at home, school, or on the go. This set also includes a surprise gift , making it even more exciting! Designed with a light pink lid , a secure screw-on top, and a built-in straw, this tumbler is both stylish and practical. 🎨 Set Includes: ✔️ Hello Kitty 700ml tumbler with screw-on lid and reusable straw ✔️ 4 x assorted colouring pens for customising your cup ✔️ 1 x gem sticker sheet to add sparkle and fun ✔️ 1 x surprise gift for an extra treat 🔹 Important Information: Handwash only – not suitable for dishwasher or microwave use For cold drinks only Recommended for children aged 5+ and Hello Kitty fans of all ages This Hello Kitty Colour Your Own Tumbler makes a wonderful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or as a fun activity set for kids who love arts and crafts. Get yours today and sip in style with a tumbler that’s uniquely yours!
